MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-03-2000 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-10-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUL-10-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, JURY DEMAND STRICKEN; N/A BY DEFT AT SETT CONF.

C/C FOR TRIAL BEFORE L. NORRIS, JUDGE; F. HENTON, CLERK AND K. HELD, CSR. PLTF APPEARED BY T. WRIGHT, ESQ. DEFT NO APPEARANCE. CT AWARDS DEFAULT JDGMT TO PLTF. V KIRCHER AND AGAINST DEFT. JOAQUIN FLORES AS FOLLOWS: PLTF AWARDED IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 20-12TH ST, #520, SAN FRANCISCO, CA.AND RENTAL AGREEMENT WHEREBY DEFT RESIDES IS FORFEITED. CT AWARDS MONETARY DAMAGES TO PLTF & AGAINST DEFT AS FOLLOWS: $470 DUE & OWING UNDER 3 DAY NOTICE & $631.38 PER DIEM, TOTAL DAMAGES: $1,101.38.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEFLORES, JOAQUIN B. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 12TH ST. #520 S.F. $1,101.38 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,101.38, LEASE FORFEITED
